com.nexacro.java.xapi.data

Class ConstantColumnHeader

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.ColumnHeader
      • com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.ConstantColumnHeader
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable

    public class ConstantColumnHeader
extends ColumnHeader

    ColumnHeader with

    DataSet constant value(value).

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
